overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk luxury apartment overlooking a neon-lit cityscape, transitioning through a red-lit server corridor and exiting into an industrial hallway. The footage is from a video game with cinematic lighting and futuristic architecture.

dense urban skyline with illuminated skyscrapers and neon signs visible through the window

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person perspective walking through a spacious, dark luxury apartment with teal neon ceiling lights and glowing floor blocks. The camera moves steadily toward a large glass wall revealing a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape with illuminated skyscrapers in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the floor-to-ceiling glass window, revealing a stunning view of the cyberpunk city at night with towering skyscrapers adorned with neon lights and holographic advertisements. An office desk and chair become visible in the foreground as the camera reaches the window.

segments.scene_description: The camera turns away from the city view and moves back through the apartment, tilting upward to showcase the teal neon ceiling strips and modern furniture including a sofa. The glowing floor blocks recede into the distance as the camera explores the interior space.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions abruptly to a narrow, enclosed corridor lined with tall server racks on both sides, illuminated by striking red neon accent lights. The camera moves forward over a metal grate floor toward a distant ceiling vent with a fan.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a glass door at the end of the server corridor, exiting into an industrial service hallway bathed in teal light. Steam rises from vents along the walls, and white arrow markings are visible on the floor as the camera moves into this new environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that begins in a dark, high-end luxury apartment and transitions into a stark, industrial service area. It begins by gliding through a spacious interior defined by teal neon ceiling lights and glowing floor blocks, moving steadily toward a floor-to-ceiling glass wall that reveals a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape of holographic advertisements and towering skyscrapers. As the camera reaches an office desk by the window, it turns away to sweep back through the room, tilting upward to showcase the modern furniture and geometric lighting before shifting abruptly into a narrow, red-lit corridor lined with server racks. The camera then advances over a metal grate floor toward a ceiling vent, finally passing through a glass door to enter an industrial hallway where teal light mixes with rising steam and white directional markings on the floor.
